case_title: ANNETTE LOUISE STUBBS VS. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUBBS, ANNETTE LOUISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE THIS ACTION WITHIN SIX MONTHS AFTER THE CLAIM WAS DENIED BY THE DISTRICT AS REQUIRED BY GOVT CODE SECT 945.6. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY STUBBS, ANNETTE LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUBBS, ANNETTE LOUISE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY STUBBS, ANNETTE LOUISE GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STUBBS, ANNETTE LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
